senses.meaning: 维护治安的执法机构或人员

example.en: We should call the police if we see a dangerous situation.
example.zh: 如果看到危险情况，我们应该报警。

senses.meaning: （冠词 the + police）警察部门，警方

example.en: The police are checking bags at the station exit.
example.zh: 警察在车站出口检查行李。

teachingExamples.en: Go to the nearest police station and explain what happened.
teachingExamples.zh: 去最近的警察局说明发生了什么事。

example.en: She had to call the police after her phone was taken.
example.zh: 手机被拿走后她不得不报警。

example.en: My passport is lost—I need help right away.
example.zh: 我的护照丢了——我需要立刻求助。

example.en: We got lost near the old town but locals helped us.
example.zh: 我们在老城附近迷路了，但当地人帮了我们。

teachingExamples.en: Report lost items at the airport information desk.
teachingExamples.zh: 在机场问询处登记遗失物品。

example.en: He went to lost property to look for his bag.
example.zh: 他去失物招领处找自己的包。

senses.meaning: 被窃取的（常作表语或定语）

example.en: My wallet was stolen on the train yesterday.
example.zh: 我的钱包昨天在火车上被偷了。

teachingExamples.en: Tell the police which items were stolen and when.
teachingExamples.zh: 告诉警察哪些东西被偷了以及什么时候。

example.en: The shop returned the stolen goods to the owner.
example.zh: 商店把赃物还给了失主。

example.en: A child is missing; staff are asking everyone to help look.
example.zh: 有孩子走失了；工作人员请所有人帮忙寻找。

example.en: The form is missing a signature, so the embassy sent it back.
example.zh: 表格少了一个签名，所以大使馆退回来了。

teachingExamples.en: File a missing person report if someone has not returned.
teachingExamples.zh: 若有人未归，可报人口失踪。

example.en: Your luggage should not go missing if it is tagged well.
example.zh: 行李牌贴好，一般就不容易丢。

relatedWords.meaning: 丢失的（多指丢物，不一定指人）

senses.meaning: 向警方等正式说明情况、报案

example.en: You should report the theft to the local police within 24 hours.
example.zh: 你应在 24 小时内向当地警方报案。

senses.meaning: （名词）书面或口头的情况说明

example.en: After the interview, the officer gave us a report number.
example.zh: 问话后，警官给了我们一个报案编号。

teachingExamples.en: They asked me to report any suspicious bags to staff.
teachingExamples.zh: 他们要求我把可疑行李告诉工作人员。

phrases.meaning: 正式提交报告；立案报案

example.en: We had to file a report at the police station for insurance.
example.zh: 为了保险理赔，我们得在警察局立案。

senses.meaning: （向保险公司等）申请赔偿、理赔

example.en: You can make a travel insurance claim for lost luggage.
example.zh: 行李丢失可以向旅行保险申请理赔。

example.en: Go to the desk to claim your bag after the delay.
example.zh: 航班延误后去柜台领取你的行李。

teachingExamples.en: Keep all receipts if you want to claim medical costs.
teachingExamples.zh: 若要报销医疗费用，请保留所有收据。

example.en: The insurance claim can take a few weeks to process.
example.zh: 保险理赔可能要几周才能处理完。

senses.meaning: 一国在他国首都的外交代表机构

example.en: Contact your embassy if your passport is lost abroad.
example.zh: 在国外遗失护照时请联系本国大使馆。

teachingExamples.en: The embassy can issue an emergency travel document.
teachingExamples.zh: 大使馆可以签发紧急旅行证件。

phrases.meaning: 大使馆官网（查开放时间、预约）

example.en: Check the embassy website for holiday closures.
example.zh: 查大使馆官网了解节假日闭馆安排。

relatedWords.meaning: 领事馆（多在非首都城市）

senses.meaning: 在境外城市为侨民提供签证、护照等服务的机构

example.en: The nearest consulate is two hours away by train.
example.zh: 最近的领事馆坐火车要两小时。

senses.meaning: 与大使馆分工：领事业务常在领事馆办理

example.en: She renewed her passport at the consulate in Shanghai.
example.zh: 她在上海的领事馆续办了护照。

teachingExamples.en: Call the consulate hotline before you travel to confirm hours.
teachingExamples.zh: 出行前致电领事热线确认办公时间。

example.en: The Consulate General handles emergencies for citizens in the region.
example.zh: 总领事馆为本地区公民处理紧急事务。

relatedWords.meaning: 大使馆（首都级外交机构）

example.en: Contact the hotel reception if you need an interpreter.
example.zh: 需要翻译请联系酒店前台。

example.en: Write down an emergency contact before you leave.
example.zh: 出发前写下紧急联系人。

teachingExamples.en: You can contact us at this number any time of day.
teachingExamples.zh: 你可以随时拨打这个号码联系我们。

example.en: Put your emergency contact on the back of your ID card copy.
example.zh: 把紧急联系人写在身份证复印件背面。

senses.meaning: 你是谁（证件、姓名等可核实信息）

example.en: Officers may ask for proof of identity at the border.
example.zh: 边境人员可能要求出示身份证明。

senses.meaning: 身份盗用语境下的“身份信息”

example.en: Report identity theft to the police and your bank immediately.
example.zh: 遭遇身份盗用应立即报警并通知银行。

teachingExamples.en: Keep a photo of your identity card in cloud storage.
teachingExamples.zh: 把身份证照片备份在云盘里。

example.en: Bring a valid identity document when you visit the embassy.
example.zh: 去大使馆时请携带有效身份证件。
